subcodes.first_line: In this day the Sun of Truth hath dawned from the horizon of the heaven of divine Will, and its rays have encompassed the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز آفتاب حقیقت از افق سماء مشیت الهی مشرق و انوارش عالم را احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @scarcity of receptive souls, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power of the Manifestation of God
